title: Why Aston Martin are committed to a bold upgrade schedule
summary: Recent weeks have seen a Formula 1 development war well underway with most teams bringing new parts almost every race, and rivals carefully checking the FIA’s official list of aerodynamic upgrades. However Aston Martin have taken a step back from the usual schedule to follow their own path – and despite the pain that entails, have stuck to it.

title: Lewis Hamilton reveals secret injury as Mercedes introduce team orders
summary:
Lewis Hamilton revealed more details into the serious injury he sustained just weeks into his move at Ferrari last year, while Kimi Antonelli confirmed Mercedes will introduce team orders from this weekend's Austrian Grand Prix.

It is upgrades galore at the Red Bull Ring this weekend, with both McLaren and Audi introducing upside-down rear wings. Red Bull also has a significant upgrade package for its home race, although Max Verstappen has downplayed how significant it is for his F1 future.

Join RacingNews365's Nick Golding and Samuel Coop as they dissect Austrian GP media day!

All Formula 1 manufacturers were informed of the initial results of the first ADUO (Additional Development and Upgrade Opportunities) period during the Monaco Grand Prix weekend and therefore know where they stand, subject to the additional check. title: From simulator to stopwatch: The creative evidence teams have used to dispute F1 race results
summary:
Formula 1 teams have the power to appeal penalties imposed by the stewards over a race weekend. But to do so, they must present new evidence that hasn’t yet been seen before by F1’s law enforcement.
As a result, teams have investigated every avenue of the series to uncover new, creative and clever evidence that they believe could help them attempt to overturn a racing result.
